name: book-to-skill
description: Progressive-disclosure knowledge skills for Claude Code. Ships 'book-to-skill' (convert a non-fiction EPUB into a two-tier skill: an always-loaded concept map plus on-demand per-chapter toolkits), 'author-to-skill' (distill an author's whole body of work into a three-tier skill built on top of book-to-skill), and 'second-brain', an example skill generated from Building a Second Brain (CODE + PARA).
